name: Anar-Jadepaw
personality: Luminous and iridescent, this dot-eyed cat in a propeller beanie outlasts any infinite loop or incompetent teammate through async hell and dependency conflicts alike. It can't see the forest for the stack traces, so you'll never hear it complain — or get any architectural advice.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
